title: ICC Complementarity Case Room
public_claim: ICC Complementarity Case Room is a legal-threshold reasoning chamber for historical and operational case-study work on complementarity.
distinctive_mechanism: It turns ICC complementarity into a decision workflow: case definition, actors, constraints, causal mechanism, analogy limits, admissibility, domestic capacity, unwillingness, evidence burden, and jurisdictional claim limits.
